untranslatable_reason: Signal requires stationarity detection and mean-reversion confirmation via statistical tests (ADF test, half-life calculation, cointegration analysis). These quantitative measures are not available in the allowed indicator set. The entry/exit conditions use SMA crossovers as a practical proxy for mean-reversion, but true stationarity regime identification requires advanced time-series analysis not expressible with the provided indicators.
translation_notes: CHAN_QT_DRY_0 is a meta-signal about regime identification rather than a direct trading rule. Implemented a practical mean-reversion proxy using SMA crossovers: enter when price deviates from and then reverts to the 20-period mean. Direction is context-dependent (long when price overshoots below mean, short when overshoots above). Actual parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life) are author-silent and require empirical optimization. The 'STATIONARY_REGIME' target indicates this signal should only trade in confirmed stationary market regimes, which requires external regime detection.
